markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review new AI-generated images and align on the production workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/yyQR9to2T6xf63_J6sYx9gEzj74F5uc7?tab=summary&timestamp=38.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Visual Style:** Remove "sketchy tidbits" from images to align with the brand's clean, modern aesthetic.](https://fathom.video/share/yyQR9to2T6xf63_J6sYx9gEzj74F5uc7?tab=summary&timestamp=212.0)
  - [**Image Specs:** Vizcom will provide one 1920x1080 image per post; GrowthX will handle resizing for all platforms (blog, OG, thumbnail).](https://fathom.video/share/yyQR9to2T6xf63_J6sYx9gEzj74F5uc7?tab=summary&timestamp=312.0)
  - [**Workflow:** GrowthX MEs will select image options in Airtable for Maura's final approval; Carly will build a dedicated Airtable interface for this.](https://fathom.video/share/yyQR9to2T6xf63_J6sYx9gEzj74F5uc7?tab=summary&timestamp=550.0)
  - [**Ownership:** GrowthX will upload approved images to Webflow, maintaining their current content management process.](https://fathom.video/share/yyQR9to2T6xf63_J6sYx9gEzj74F5uc7?tab=summary&timestamp=648.0)

## Topics

### Visual Style Feedback

  - [**Problem:** New AI-generated images include "sketchy tidbits" (e.g., icons, underlines) that conflict with the brand's clean aesthetic.](https://fathom.video/share/yyQR9to2T6xf63_J6sYx9gEzj74F5uc7?tab=summary&timestamp=212.0)
  - [**Solution:** Katia will update the image generation prompts to remove these elements.](https://fathom.video/share/yyQR9to2T6xf63_J6sYx9gEzj74F5uc7?tab=summary&timestamp=212.0)
  - [**New Direction:** Focus on clean, 3D subjects centered in the frame. Minimal, functional elements (like underlines) are acceptable if used sparingly.](https://fathom.video/share/yyQR9to2T6xf63_J6sYx9gEzj74F5uc7?tab=summary&timestamp=266.0)

### Image Sizing & Specs

  - [**Vizcom Deliverable:** One high-res image per post (1920x1080, 16:9 ratio).](https://fathom.video/share/yyQR9to2T6xf63_J6sYx9gEzj74F5uc7?tab=summary&timestamp=501.0)
  - [**GrowthX Responsibility:** Resize the single source image for all required formats:](https://fathom.video/share/yyQR9to2T6xf63_J6sYx9gEzj74F5uc7?tab=summary&timestamp=312.0)
      - [Blog Image](https://fathom.video/share/yyQR9to2T6xf63_J6sYx9gEzj74F5uc7?tab=summary&timestamp=344.0)
      - [Open Graph (OG) Image (e.g., 1200x630 for social)](https://fathom.video/share/yyQR9to2T6xf63_J6sYx9gEzj74F5uc7?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)
      - [Thumbnail (e.g., 1280x720)](https://fathom.video/share/yyQR9to2T6xf63_J6sYx9gEzj74F5uc7?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)
  - [**Vizcom Action:** Maura will provide "safety zones" for the 1920x1080 image to ensure key elements are not cropped on different platforms.](https://fathom.video/share/yyQR9to2T6xf63_J6sYx9gEzj74F5uc7?tab=summary&timestamp=501.0)
  - [**Alt Tags:** Carly will confirm with Jenny if alt tags are auto-generated or if manual creation is needed.](https://fathom.video/share/yyQR9to2T6xf63_J6sYx9gEzj74F5uc7?tab=summary&timestamp=470.0)

### Production Workflow

  - [**Image Selection:** GrowthX MEs will select a few image options in Airtable for each article.](https://fathom.video/share/yyQR9to2T6xf63_J6sYx9gEzj74F5uc7?tab=summary&timestamp=550.0)
  - [**Approval:** Maura will review and approve the selections directly in Airtable.](https://fathom.video/share/yyQR9to2T6xf63_J6sYx9gEzj74F5uc7?tab=summary&timestamp=550.0)
  - [**Airtable Interface:** Carly will build a dedicated interface for Maura to easily track upcoming blog posts and manage approvals.](https://fathom.video/share/yyQR9to2T6xf63_J6sYx9gEzj74F5uc7?tab=summary&timestamp=628.0)
  - [**Webflow Upload:** GrowthX will upload approved images to the Webflow CMS, maintaining their current content management process.](https://fathom.video/share/yyQR9to2T6xf63_J6sYx9gEzj74F5uc7?tab=summary&timestamp=648.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Katia:** Update image generation prompts to remove "sketchy tidbits."](https://fathom.video/share/yyQR9to2T6xf63_J6sYx9gEzj74F5uc7?tab=summary&timestamp=212.0)
  - [**Maura:** Provide "safety zone" guidelines for the 1920x1080 image.](https://fathom.video/share/yyQR9to2T6xf63_J6sYx9gEzj74F5uc7?tab=summary&timestamp=501.0)
  - [**Carly:**](https://fathom.video/share/yyQR9to2T6xf63_J6sYx9gEzj74F5uc7?tab=summary&timestamp=470.0)
      - [Build the Airtable interface for Maura.](https://fathom.video/share/yyQR9to2T6xf63_J6sYx9gEzj74F5uc7?tab=summary&timestamp=628.0)
      - [Confirm the alt tag generation process with Jenny.](https://fathom.video/share/yyQR9to2T6xf63_J6sYx9gEzj74F5uc7?tab=summary&timestamp=470.0)
      - [Confirm with Emily that GrowthX will upload approved images to Webflow.](https://fathom.video/share/yyQR9to2T6xf63_J6sYx9gEzj74F5uc7?tab=summary&timestamp=648.0)
